description: The Aspire.Hosting.Blazor 13.4.0 stable package had an issue where gateway scripts were only deployed under buildTransitive rather than lib, causing TypeScript AppHosts using addBlazorGateway to fail with a capability error. The package is kept preview-shaped on the 13.4.x release branch to prevent users from picking up the broken stable version while the packaging fix is being addressed.
name: Keep Aspire.Hosting.Blazor as preview on 13.4.x
